nasb.text: Therefore the Lord will afflict the scalp of the daughters of Zion with scabs, And the Lord will make their foreheads bare.”

esv.text: therefore the Lord will strike with a scab the heads of the daughters of Zion, and the Lord will lay bare their secret parts.

cnv.text: 因此，主必使錫安的女子頭頂長出禿瘡； 耶和華又使她們露出前額。”

ccb.text: 所以，我要使她们头上长疮， 露出头皮。”

csbs.text: 所以主必使锡安女子头顶生疮， 耶和华必使她们的下体赤露。”
